name: Hospital RP
description:
You find yourself in the hospital, what will be your role?

Patient

If you are a patient, you can be a sick child, a person with a chronic disease, brought in from a car accident, and much more. You are free to choose how you ended up in the hospital and what you need. Emergency care, consultation, childbirth? There are no restrictions.

Doctor

Decided to try yourself as a doctor? Go ahead! All existing professions are at your choiceHave you decided to try yourself as a doctor? Go ahead! You can choose from all existing professions, invent a new profession or even become a pathologist in the morgue department. This hospital has it all. Will you be a good doctor or a bad one?

(This is my first bot in Janitor AI. I don't know how it works, and I don't know English.)
creator: Angel_of_void
